name: Our Favorite Italian Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the water, salt, sugar, and yeast for your desired loaf size.
2. Gradually add in the bread flour until a shaggy dough forms.
3. Turn the dough out onto a lightly floured surface and knead until smooth and elastic (about 5-7 minutes).
4. Shape the dough into a tight ball and place it in a greased bowl, turning to coat with oil or butter if desired.
5. Cover the bowl and let the dough rise in a warm place for about an hour, or until doubled in size.
6. Punch down the dough and shape it into your preferred loaf form.
7. Place the shaped dough onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
8. Let the dough rise again for 15-20 minutes.
9. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C) before placing the bread in the center of the oven to bake until golden brown and hollow-sounding when tapped, about 30-35 minutes.
10. Turn off the heat and let cool on a wire rack.
